_comment: Mutation testing via the Vitest runner: per-test coverage means only the tests covering a mutant rerun, so mutating the whole app stays fast in CI.
_thresholds_note: The whole app (public_html/**) is at a literal 100% mutation score; genuine equivalent mutants carry documented // Stryker disable comments (see EQUIVALENTS.md). break: 100 holds that line. Runs nightly via .github/workflows/mutation.yml.
